config.heading: RENDERING SERVICES ACROSS CANBERRA
config.intro: From full exterior render transformations to textured coatings, cement render, acrylic render and patch repairs, AAM1 Coating Services helps Canberra properties look cleaner, sharper and built to last.

projects.title: Exterior Render
projects.desc: Give tired brick, blueboard or cement sheet a clean modern finish with professional exterior rendering.

projects.title: Texture Coating
projects.desc: Create depth, protection and street appeal with premium texture coatings. A great choice for new builds.

projects.title: Commercial Rendering
projects.desc: Professional rendering and texture coatings for large-scale building exteriors across Canberra.

projects.title: Venetian Plaster
projects.desc: Add a luxury designer finish with handcrafted Venetian plaster. Perfect for feature walls, bathrooms and premium spaces.
